records.ety: [L. linealis belonging to a line, fr. linea line: cf. F. linal. See 3d Line.]

defs: Descending in a direct line from an ancestor; hereditary; derived from ancestors; -- opposed to collateral; as, a lineal descent or a lineal descendant.
quotes: The prime and ancient right of lineal succession.

defs: Inheriting by direct descent; having the right by direct descent to succeed (to).
quotes: For only you are lineal to the throne.

defs: Composed of lines; delineated; as, lineal designs.
In the direction of a line; of or pertaining to a line; measured on, or ascertained by, a line; linear; as, lineal magnitude.
